items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG detail zip wallet. Gucci leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with red GG accessories to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Red leather trim, cloud print fabric lining, GG detail, interior: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG👉The 'Gucci Cosmogonie' series made its debut at the historic Castello di Monte Castello in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's vintage elements. It is crafted from soft leather and features the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Brown soft leather, shiny gold-tone accessories. Interior: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle, and an adjustable shoulder strap with a double-G magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Shoulder Bag. The Gucci Horsebit 1955 series draws inspiration from archival designs, skillfully blending classic details from over sixty years ago with the essence of modern fashion, highlighting the unique charm of the horsebit. The design pattern is inspired by the brand's equestrian roots, composed of two elements: a double ring and a long strip, which has become one of the brand's highly recognizable iconic elements. Beige/Walnut GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, gold-tone hardware, front horsebit detail, top handle, metal chain strap.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the horsebit element, cleverly incorporating a dazzling crystal outer ring. This small shoulder bag is crafted in pink leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal horsebit details, showcasing a modern temperament. Pink leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front horsebit detail, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit Slim Small Denim Shoulder Bag. This Gucci Horsebit Slim shoulder bag is crafted from the new GG black denim fabric from the 2024 Pre-Fall collection, featuring silver-tone hardware on the strap to create a metallic texture and highlight a contrasting aesthetic. Black leather trim and tonal key charm add fullness to the design. Black and grey GG denim, black leather trim, as a selected item for the Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Silk lining, slender silhouette with horsebit detail, leather key charm, shoulder strap (20cm high). Zipper closure.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Introduction: The 'March of Love' new fashion collection tells moving stories with color. Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s vintage designs. The classic brown and ebony designs, reinterpreted with a fresh look, convey the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. The material features boutique-quality PVC paired with high-density webbing, and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.
items.name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Introduction: The 'March of Love' new fashion collection tells moving stories with color. Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s vintage designs. The classic brown and ebony designs, reinterpreted with a fresh look, convey the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. The material features boutique-quality PVC paired with high-density webbing, and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.

Color: Brown/pvc.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Ophidia GG Small Shoulder Bag. The Ophidia collection for the 2024 Pre-Fall season features shoulder bags, totes, and handbags crafted from GG black denim, cleverly incorporating silver-tone metal hardware to create a playful contrast. Black and grey GG denim, silver-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, double G, double G pendant zipper pull, interior open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (44cm high). Crossbody wear. Zipper closure, weight: approx. 0.39kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Ophidia series GG mini shoulder bag. As one of the brand's representative fabrics, GG denim is inspired by 1930s vintage designs. On this denim, the classic beige and ebony colorways are reinterpreted in black and gray for a sincere tribute to the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern is a bright highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag, showcasing a unique style. Black and gray GG denim, silver-tone accessories, cotton-linen blend lining with double-G. Handle: 3cm(H) chain strap (50cm(H)) lock closure. Weight: approx. 0.5kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, structured body, flap closure, and double G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length). Also works as a crossbody bag. Spring snap flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
